messages.basicsSaveError: Unable to save the group basics.

validation.knowledge: Please describe the shared knowledge scope.
validation.analysisLoading: Quizmate AI is still analyzing the domain. Please wait a moment.
validation.analysisError: Quizmate AI could not infer the domain yet. Please retry the analysis.
validation.analysisMissing: Please enter the knowledge scope so Quizmate AI can infer the domain.
validation.domain: Please select one domain from the Quizmate AI suggestions.
validation.groupGoal: Please enter the group learning goal.

basic.title: Basics & Ground Rules
basic.description: Group name and the shared operating rules

learning.title: Shared Learning Profile
learning.description: Knowledge, domain, and the team learning rhythm

stepOne.title: Set up the group basics
stepOne.description: Name the group and add shared operating notes so everyone follows the same study rhythm.
stepOne.groupNameHint: Use a short, recognizable name so members can spot this group immediately.
stepOne.memberDescription: Best for regular learners joining the group.
stepOne.contributorDescription: Best for members who can contribute learning content and activities.
stepOne.rulesHint: Capture the study rhythm, collaboration rules, or material-sharing norms the whole group should follow.
stepOne.rulesPlaceholder: Example: Run two check-ins per week, ask questions by topic, and cite the source when sharing materials.

stepTwo.title: Set up the shared learning profile
stepTwo.description: This step defines the shared knowledge scope, the AI domain, and the default learning rhythm for the whole group.

workflow.title: Finish the setup in three focused choices
workflow.description: Describe what the group is learning, pick the AI-suggested domain, and turn on the options that match your learning flow.
workflow.describeDescription: Briefly explain what the group is learning or preparing for.
workflow.domainDescription: Choose the right baseline so the AI understands this workspace correctly.
workflow.modeDescription: Decide whether the group is focused on new learning or review.

stepTwo.knowledgePlaceholder: Example: Our group is studying JLPT N3 to strengthen grammar, vocabulary, and reading practice by topic.
stepTwo.knowledgeHint: The more specific the description is, the better Quizmate AI can suggest the right domain for your group.
stepTwo.selectedDomainHint: This domain becomes the shared baseline for roadmap suggestions, quizzes, and learning activities.
stepTwo.modePrompt: Choose the main learning rhythm for the group
stepTwo.studyNewDescription: Best when the group is learning new material and needs a clear roadmap.
stepTwo.reviewDescription: Best when the group has studied before, wants a structured review flow, and may still create mock tests later.
stepTwo.mockTestDescription: Best when the group wants to practice exams and track progress with tests.
stepTwo.groupGoalPlaceholder: Example: Finish 20 grammar themes and 1500 vocabulary items in 8 weeks.
stepTwo.learningSwitchesHint: Turn on a roadmap or entry assessment depending on how your group runs.

analysis.loading: Quizmate AI is analyzing the knowledge scope to suggest the best domain.
analysis.error: Quizmate AI could not generate a reliable domain suggestion yet. You can retry now.
analysis.interpretingLabel: Quizmate AI understands this knowledge as
analysis.tooBroad: The current knowledge scope is still broad. Add a bit more focus if you want more precise suggestions.
analysis.emptyDomainDescription: Quizmate AI could not build domain suggestions from the current description. Try adding more detail or rerun the analysis.

roadmap.title: Enable a shared roadmap
roadmap.description: Create a shared study structure so the whole group has a clearer pace.
roadmap.studyNewDescription: This mode turns the roadmap on by default so the group has a clearer path for new learning.

entryAssessment.title: Require an entry assessment
entryAssessment.description: Apply this to new members before they join the shared learning flow.

bootstrap.title: Preparing your group workspace
bootstrap.description: The setup wizard will open as soon as the draft workspace is ready.

studio.requireUploadBeforeActions: Upload at least one document in the Documents tab before using this feature.

memberStats.title: Member stats
memberStats.description: Use this tab after Overview: inspect one learner at a time, refresh their learning snapshot, and assign focused work.

hero.activeRowsNote: {{count}} row(s) already have a generated snapshot.

scope.detailBody: Attempts, passed count, average result, pass rate, and AI class live on each row.
scope.refreshBody: Refresh a single member without regenerating the entire group view.
scope.actionBody: Assign a quiz or prepare a follow-up for exactly one learner.

memberStats.roadmapPending: Member-specific roadmap action is waiting for backend support.
memberStats.contributorReadOnly: Contributors can view member stats only.
memberStats.assignMissingMember: Member was not found. Please reopen this dialog.
memberStats.assignDialogDescription: Choose one quiz to assign to {{name}}.

forms.loadMaterialsError: Unable to load shared documents. Please close and reopen this form.
forms.workspaceMaterialsEmpty: No shared documents yet. Upload files in the Documents tab, then select them directly in this form.
forms.sourceSelectHint: Choose the documents AI should use for this creation.

challenge.title: Challenge
challenge.description: Compete with your group members in real-time challenge matches.
challenge.cancelDialogDescription: Are you sure you want to cancel this challenge? Members will no longer be able to join and the schedule will be removed.
challenge.finishDialogDescription: The leaderboard will be locked in and the challenge will move to FINISHED. Manual finish is only allowed once everyone has submitted. This cannot be undone.
challenge.quizSnapshotReviewDraftBody: This match belongs to a challenge, not the shared group content list. Members only take it when the challenge starts. Use the Check tab to review content, edit via Compose, then Publish when ready — there is no group-wide distribution like regular group assignments.
challenge.quizSnapshotReviewNoTakeHint: This match only opens when the challenge starts (on schedule or when the leader runs it). Rankings are per challenge — you cannot start the match from this screen.
challenge.editDialogDescription: You can only edit when more than 1 hour remains before the scheduled start. Double-check timezone and duration.
challenge.leaderFairPlayQuizHint: You're competing: after the match is published you can't preview questions. While it's still a draft you can compose and review.
challenge.reviewContributorsHint: Assigned members cannot register for this challenge. You cannot assign someone who is already a participant.
challenge.reviewContributorCannotRegister: You are assigned as a match reviewer, so you cannot register for this challenge.
challenge.reviewInviteeNotice: You were invited to review this challenge match. Open “Open match” → Check tab: mark the match as OK or submit an APPROVED vote when ready. At the start time, the system will open the challenge automatically once review requirements are met.
challenge.reviewInviteeShortHint: Click “Open match” in the Challenge match block above, then open the “Check” tab.
challenge.reviewQuizNotReadyHint: The match is not ready to preview yet (for example still generating). Please try again later.

ranking.title: Group ranking
ranking.description: Current top 3 and the full RP board for the group.
ranking.empty: No member has completed any quiz yet.
ranking.meta: Aggregated from {{quizCount}} active quizzes · {{memberCount}} participating members
ranking.podiumSubtitle: The leading three are setting the pace for the group.

detail.title: Why are they ranked here?
detail.description: Detailed RP earned from valid attempts in the shared published area.
detail.evidenceHint: Each quiz counts only the first official attempt.

ranking.note: Only shared published content counts. Each quiz uses only the first official attempt to prevent spam.

accuracy.title: Accuracy
accuracy.subtitle: Each quiz uses the first official attempt, then averages the accuracy

completion.title: Quiz completion
completion.subtitle: Ranked by how many quizzes were completed at least once

fallback.description: Review UI space for group study.

metrics.activeMembersCaption: Members with a steady weekly participation rhythm.

metrics.activeMembersCountCaption: Members with at least 5 days of activity.

overview.hubDescription: Review end-to-end for materials, moderation, quiz, discussion, performance dashboard and roadmap in a single shell.
overview.moderationQueueDetail: {{count}} document(s) need leader or contributor review.
overview.openDiscussionsDetail: {{count}} thread(s) unresolved, openable from quiz or result screens.
overview.recentMaterialsDescription: Lane to manage member uploads and the moderation queue.
overview.quizDiscussionsDescription: Deep-link discussions opened from quiz results or the quiz studio.

materials.title: Member materials
materials.description: Manage documents uploaded in the group, filter by uploader and status, and view extracted details.
materials.searchPlaceholder: Search by document name or summary
materials.emptyDescription: Try another status, uploader, or upload more documents to review.
materials.noSummary: No summary for this document yet.

moderation.title: Moderation queue
moderation.description: Queue of documents that are flagged, rejected, or need re-upload. Each action pushes an event to the mock logs.
moderation.emptyDescription: Moderation queue is empty. You can go back to the materials hub to view all documents.
moderation.needsReview: Document needs further review before being used in the group.

quiz.studioDescription: Create a mock quiz to review the flow of studio, practice, exam, result, and per-question discussion.
quiz.recentAttemptsDescription: Latest quiz attempt history in the group.
quiz.noAttempts: No attempts yet in the mock review.

members.title: Member UI by role
members.description: Leaders manage the roster and upload permissions, contributors follow content lanes, members review personal progress.
members.personalLaneDefault: Track progress, assigned quizzes, and followed discussions.

performance.title: Per-member performance review
performance.description: View accuracy, streak, roadmap progress, upload outcomes, recent logs, and discussion participation.

roadmap.title: Roadmap board
roadmap.description: Phases, knowledge, progress, owner, blockers, and quiz-material links to review the full group flow.
roadmap.detailEmptyDescription: Roadmap detail may not be seeded or synced yet.

logs.title: Activity logs
logs.description: Aggregated logs from live activity and mock events generated when moderation, discussion, or quiz change.

materialDetail.emptyDescription: Material detail may have been deleted or is not synced yet.
materialDetail.title: Manage uploaded document
materialDetail.description: View extracted text, summary, moderation report, and perform rename / delete / review actions.

discussionDetail.emptyDescription: The thread may not be initialized or the quiz/question no longer exists.
discussionDetail.contextSubtitle: {{title}} • Async discussion per quiz question for leader, contributor, and member to review together.
discussionDetail.question: Question
discussionDetail.replyPlaceholder: Write opinions, counter-arguments, or notes for the whole group to review...

sidebar.flowDescription: Navigate sections via `?section=` and keep detail routes separate for materials, discussion, and roadmap.

shell.notFoundDescription: The workspace may not have been created or you no longer have access.

queue.reject: The material was rejected for this group workspace.

profileGate.completeDescription: The leader must finish the shared group profile first. Until then, inviting members, uploading materials, and using studio tabs stay locked.

roadmap.setupPromptTitle: Set up a roadmap for your group
roadmap.setupPromptDescription: Set the knowledge amount, pacing, total days, and daily study time first so the roadmap matches the group learning plan.

attention.keepQueueShort: Keep the queue short and current.

attention.uploadReviewNote: Contributor lane is set but source upload is still blocked.

compact.headlineSummary: Use this tab for group-level operations: health signals, coordination gaps, invitations, and activity flow.

scope.questionValue: What needs attention across the whole group?
scope.groupHealthBody: Invitation queue, role coverage, upload readiness, and recent activity.
scope.attentionBody: Highlights operational gaps before they become member-level work.
scope.memberStatsBody: Open member stats when you need per-person actions or learning detail.

compact.memberStatsCtaBody: Use Member stats for individual snapshots, quiz assignment, and member-specific follow-up.
compact.learningIntelligenceSummary: Live aggregates from quiz attempts, scores, and AI classification — tap any card to inspect a member.
compact.summaryLoadError: Could not load learning summary. Try again later.
compact.scoreSpotlightSubtitle: Ranks {{pageSize}} members per page by average result from the latest snapshot.
compact.activityChartSubtitle: Recent log activity helps you see whether the group is moving or standing still.
compact.roleChartSubtitle: Mix of leaders, contributors, members, and execution coverage across the group.

snapshots.emptyLatest: No snapshots yet. Update daily snapshots to generate data from quiz attempts.
snapshots.noQuizHint: There are no completed quiz attempts to inspect yet.

analyticsUpgrade.title: Workspace analytics
analyticsUpgrade.description: Group learning dashboards use the same Workspace analytics entitlement as individual stats. Upgrade your plan to unlock member cards, charts, and drill-down views.

charts.roleDistributionSubtitle: Compare role load across leader, contributor, and member lanes.
charts.weeklyChartSubtitle: Track event volume from activity logs by day.

hero.description: Focus on who needs follow-up, which invitations are still open, and what changed most recently.

attentionPanel.title: What needs attention
attentionPanel.allGoodNote: The roster looks stable. Keep watching the log and invitation queue.

invitationsPanel.title: Current invitations
invitationsPanel.description: See who was invited, when the invitation was sent, and which requests are close to expiry.
invitationsPanel.leadersOnlyNote: Only leaders can review this queue.

activityLog.title: Group activity log
activityLog.description: A compact timeline of the most recent changes in the group.

groupWalletTab.leaderOnlyDescription: Only the group leader can manage the shared wallet, top up credits, and inspect purchase history for this workspace.
groupWalletTab.qmcDescription: QMC means QuizMate Credit — the shared credit unit this group uses for quiz, flashcard, roadmap, and other AI actions.
groupWalletTab.balanceSubtitle: Available now for shared AI actions.
groupWalletTab.dataError: Some wallet data could not be loaded. Refresh to try again.
groupWalletTab.topUpDescription: Add more QMC to this shared wallet.
groupWalletTab.notAllowedBuyCredits: This plan currently does not allow buying extra credits for the group.
groupWalletTab.noCreditPackages: No credit packages are available right now.
groupWalletTab.purchaseHistoryDescription: Recent payments for this workspace plan and shared credits.
groupWalletTab.usageHistoryDescription: Recent shared-wallet activity triggered by AI usage and credit movements.

sourceMode.existingDesc: Create a snapshot from an existing content set
sourceMode.newDesc: Create a draft challenge match and compose questions with the manual editor
sourceMode.manualDesc: Create a draft challenge match and compose questions with the manual editor
sourceMode.aiDesc: Generate a draft challenge match with QuizMate AI

mode.personalDesc: Everyone takes the same match and the leaderboard is ranked by score and time.
mode.teamDesc: Set team size or let the system auto-balance teams when the match starts.
mode.soloDesc: Pick a 4/8/16/32 slot bracket and keep the participant count aligned with the bracket.
mode.teamAutoBalanceDesc: Unlimited slots. When the match starts, registered members are split into 2 balanced teams.
mode.teamFixedSizeDesc: Registration is limited to 2 teams multiplied by the number of members per team.

quizList.countTitle: Only shared (non-assigned) content can be used for a challenge
quizList.emptyNoQuizzes: No shared content in this workspace yet
quizList.emptyNoEligible: No shared content available for a challenge
quizList.emptyNoQuizzesHint: Create a content set in the workspace first, or choose "Manual challenge" or "AI challenge" above.
quizList.emptyNoEligibleHint: Content assigned to specific members cannot be used. Publish it as shared for the whole group or remove the per-member assignment first.
quizList.emptyNoMatchesHint: Try a different keyword or clear the search box.

newQuizNotice.leadBefore: After creating the challenge, the detail page opens. Click
newQuizNotice.hint: Choose a future start time; after creation, use the manual editor to finish the match before publishing.
newQuizNotice.aiHint: Choose a future start time; after creation, use QuizMate AI to generate the match content before publishing.

schedule.descriptionPlaceholder: A short description of the challenge...
schedule.teamConfigHint: Choose how to lock slots before opening registration. The system always splits into {{count}} teams.
schedule.bracketConfigHint: Choose the bracket type first. If registration is invite-only, the invited member count must match the bracket slots.
schedule.bracketPublicHint: With public registration, the system caps the bracket at {{count}} participants.
schedule.leaderParticipatesLabel: I will take the match with everyone
schedule.leaderParticipatesDesc: You get a slot in the participant list. After the match is published, you cannot preview questions (for fairness to members). While the match is still a draft (DRAFT), you can still author and test it.

review.quizNewNotice: Manual challenge (author the questions in the challenge detail after creation)
review.quizAiNotice: AI challenge (generate the questions in the challenge detail after creation)
review.snapshotNote: The snapshot is not assigned per member; all challenge participants share this same content.

processing.label: Generating quiz
processing.hint: The system is generating questions and configuring the quiz.

acceptInvitationPage.invalidLink: The invitation link is invalid. Please double-check your email.
acceptInvitationPage.welcomeToast: Welcome! You have joined the group.

loading.title: Loading group invitation
loading.subtitle: Group details will appear before you confirm joining.

hero.fallbackDescription: You have been invited to a group workspace on QuizMate AI. Review the details below and confirm before joining.

sidebar.title: Confirm before joining the group
sidebar.step1Title: 1. Check you are using the invited email
sidebar.step1Description: The account you confirm with must match the email that received the invitation so the system puts you in the correct group.
sidebar.step2Description: After confirming, you will go straight to the workspace and see the welcome screen with the group information.

expired.title: The invitation has expired
expired.description: The leader needs to send a new invitation if you still want to join this group.

guest.title: Sign in to confirm
guest.description: You need to sign in with the account that uses email <1>{{email}}</1> to continue.

mismatch.title: You are signed in to the wrong account
mismatch.description: You are currently signed in as <1>{{currentEmail}}</1>, but this invitation is for <3>{{invitedEmail}}</3>.
mismatch.switchButton: Sign in with the correct email

accepted.title: You are already in this group
accepted.description: The workspace is ready for you to open the group info and start learning.

ready.title: Account is valid, ready to join
ready.description: After confirming, you will go straight to this group's welcome page.
ready.laterToast: You can return to this email any time to reopen the invitation link.

groupDocumentsTab.heroTitle: Manage group learning materials in one place
groupDocumentsTab.heroSubtitle: Upload shared documents, review member requests, and separate warning materials that still need a leader decision.
groupDocumentsTab.warningSectionSubtitle: These materials were flagged by AI and should be reviewed first before they enter the shared library.
groupDocumentsTab.submittedToQueue: Submitted to the group review queue
groupDocumentsTab.warningOpenHint: Open to inspect the AI moderation details before deciding.
groupDocumentsTab.librarySectionSubtitle: Track every file already attached to the group workspace and quickly filter by current status.
groupDocumentsTab.emptyFilteredMaterials: No shared document matches the current filter.
groupDocumentsTab.materialOpenHint: Click to open AI review and extracted content.
groupDocumentsTab.issueDefaultMessage: This material could not enter the group library.
groupDocumentsTab.issueOpenHint: Open the material to inspect the moderation outcome.

seatLimit.managed: Managed by the active group plan

domainReason.translation: Matches the translation-focused direction your group described.
domainReason.comparison: Fits a comparison or bridge-style learning scope across two knowledge systems.
domainReason.englishVietnamesePair: Fits a shared learning scope centered on the English-Vietnamese language pair.
domainReason.fallback1: This is the closest match to the knowledge scope your group described.
domainReason.fallback2: This is a related area the AI inferred from the knowledge you entered.
domainReason.fallback3: This is a broader context that may still fit your group learning goal.

validation.completeRequired: Please complete the required fields before reviewing the final setup.

stepOne.previewDescription: Review the display name, group size, and shared ground rules before moving to the learning profile.

confirm.title: Confirm this group profile
confirm.description: Review the summary once more. After confirmation, this setup becomes the active profile for the group workspace.
confirm.finalReviewTitle: Final review before applying to the group
confirm.finalReviewDescription: You can still return to the wizard to revise the goal, rules, or learning scope before saving.
confirm.editHint: You can still go back and edit before applying.
confirm.applyEyebrow: This group profile will be applied
confirm.applyDescription: Everything below will be saved as the current learning setup for this group workspace.

errors.missingRoundQuiz: Server did not return the match quiz.

publishHints.needDraftQuizContent: The leader must compose the match content first.
publishHints.needActiveQuiz: The challenge match must be moved from draft to active before publishing the challenge.
publishHints.needReviewer: At least one reviewer is required before publishing the challenge.
publishHints.needBothReviewers: At least one reviewer must confirm the match before publishing.
publishHints.needPrimaryReviewer: At least one reviewer is required before publishing the challenge match.
publishHints.needAssistantReviewer: Additional reviewers can help check the match.
publishHints.assistantConfirmedWaitingPrimary: A reviewer has confirmed the match. The challenge can continue when publish requirements are met.
publishHints.needReviewersConfirm: At least one reviewer must confirm the match is OK before the leader can publish the challenge.
publishHints.startTimePassed: The challenge has reached its start time, so it can no longer be published.
publishHints.afterPublishInfo: After publishing, members will see the challenge and be able to register.
publishHints.needReviewerWhenLeaderParticipates: Leader is participating, so invite 1 or 2 reviewers before publishing the challenge.

challengeDetailView.draftQuizHint: Create the match content first, then you can preview the challenge match.
challengeDetailView.leaderSetupFlowHint: Leader composes the match, a reviewer confirms it, then the challenge can be published.
challengeDetailView.processingQuizHint: The system is still generating questions for this challenge. Return here shortly to continue reviewing or editing the match.

reviewerPanel.orderHint: All reviewers share the same review role.
reviewerPanel.lastViewedEmpty: Has not opened the match yet
reviewerPanel.confirmedOkEmpty: Has not confirmed the match yet
reviewerPanel.needTwoReviewersHint: Only the primary reviewer is needed to publish.
reviewerPanel.inviteSentToast: Review invitation sent. The system has emailed the reviewer.
reviewerPanel.participatingLeaderHint: Leader is joining the challenge, so invite 1 or 2 reviewers here. All reviewers have the same role.
reviewerPanel.optionalHint: Invite up to 2 reviewers if you want another pair of eyes before publishing. All reviewers have the same role.
reviewerPanel.needReviewerWhenLeaderParticipates: Leader is participating, so invite at least 1 reviewer. You can invite up to 2 reviewers.
reviewerPanel.optionalReviewersHint: Reviewers are optional here. If invited, they can help check and clean up the match before you publish it.

finishBlocked.noParticipants: No one has registered yet, so the challenge cannot be finished early.
finishBlocked.pending: {{count}} participant(s) have not submitted yet. Manual finish is only allowed once everyone has submitted.

groupSettingsTab.identityNote: the group name anchors this room
groupSettingsTab.governanceNote: who can actively reshape the group
groupSettingsTab.subjectNote: the academic direction of this room
groupSettingsTab.heroTitle: Shape the room without breaking the rhythm
groupSettingsTab.heroDescription: This surface is for naming the collective, clarifying its purpose, and protecting the lifecycle of the workspace.
groupSettingsTab.controlNoteLeader: Edit only what improves clarity. The best group settings feel invisible because everyone understands the room instantly.
groupSettingsTab.controlNoteMember: You can review how the group is configured here, while structural edits stay with the leader.
groupSettingsTab.publicDescription: Anyone can discover this group and request to join.
groupSettingsTab.privateDescription: Only members with a direct invitation can access this group.
groupSettingsTab.guardrailsDescription: Stable metadata that frames how the group is understood
groupSettingsTab.leaderAuthorityNote: You can rename, reposition, or remove this group.

errors.generateFailed: Failed to generate template. Please try again.
errors.createMockTestFailed: Failed to create mock test. Please try again.
errors.genericGenerate: An error occurred while generating the template.
errors.questionTypesNotReady: Question types are still loading. Please try again.

createGroupMockTestForm.description: AI will generate a suitable exam template. The leader can preview and then apply it to create a DRAFT mock test for the group.
createGroupMockTestForm.scopeNotice: Mock tests only generate single-answer multiple-choice questions. Listening, Writing, and Speaking are not supported, so the AI will skip them. The generated test is saved as DRAFT so the leader can publish it later.

examName.label: Exam / test name
examName.placeholder: e.g., TOEIC 900, Mock Math HSG 2025, AWS SAA-C03...
examName.hint: AI will generate a template matching the structure and content of this exam.

custom.label: Custom request
custom.placeholder: e.g., Create a 30-question test on Python basics, increasing difficulty, focus on syntax and error handling...

materials.title: Reference materials
materials.empty: No materials in this workspace yet. AI will generate questions from the exam name.

generating.title: Generating questions for the mock test...
generating.hint: This may take from 30 seconds to a few minutes depending on the number of questions. The test will be saved as DRAFT so you can publish it later.

hero.title: A quick read of the group baseline before expanding the workspace
hero.description: Everything here reflects the live profile already saved for this group: direction, baseline rules, and the shared learning setup that the team is following.

setupStatus.label: Setup status
setupStatus.description: Whether the baseline is ready for the team

learningMode.label: Learning mode
learningMode.description: Defines the default rhythm for roadmap and content

seatLimit.label: Seat limit
seatLimit.description: Current capacity available for this group setup

coreSetup.label: Core setup
coreSetup.description: These values define how the room identifies itself and the shared baseline the team is following.

knowledge.title: What this group is learning together

learningGoal.title: What success should look like for the group

groupRules.title: Shared operating rules for new and current members

empty.title: No comments yet
empty.description: Start the discussion! Use <1>/</1> to tag a specific question.

header.title: General discussion
header.subtitle: A shared thread for the whole group, with replies and question tags in one place.

locked.title: Complete the quiz to join the discussion
locked.description: Finish the attempt first to exchange with other group members.

guideline.title: General discussion guide
guideline.slashHintSuffix: to tag a question — members clicking the chip will jump to that question

input.placeholder: Write a comment… Use / to tag a question · Enter to send
input.footerPrefix: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line ·
input.memberCanDelete: You can only delete your own comments

groupSourceDetailView.reviewApproved: Approved this material for the group.
groupSourceDetailView.reviewRejected: Rejected this material from the group.
groupSourceDetailView.reviewError: Unable to review this material right now.
groupSourceDetailView.leaderReviewActiveHint: AI has finished processing this material. The leader needs to confirm before it appears in the shared sources.
groupSourceDetailView.leaderReviewQueueHint: This material is waiting in the leader's approval queue for the group.
groupSourceDetailView.leaderReviewPrompt: Does the leader want to approve this material for the group?

shared.emptyState: No comments yet. Start the discussion for this question.

guide.title: Question discussion guide
guide.shiftEnterNewLine: Shift + Enter to start a new line
guide.discussTopic: Discuss the answers, solutions, or anything unclear about this question
guide.hoverToDelete: Hover over a comment to delete it (your comments only)

locked.title: Complete the quiz to join the discussion
locked.subtitle: Finish the quiz first so you can exchange ideas with other members about this question.

inline.footerShortcut: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line

dialog.lockedNotice: Complete the quiz to join the discussion for this question.
dialog.headerDescription: Open a dedicated thread for this question so members can discuss answers, solutions, and anything unclear.
dialog.lockedUntilFinish: Locked until you finish the quiz
dialog.commentsPerQuestionSubtitle: The question and its comments live in the same discussion thread.

roadmapCanvasView2.groupPreLearningCreateSuccess: Pre-learning creation request for the group roadmap has been submitted.
roadmapCanvasView2.groupPreLearningCreateFail: Unable to create pre-learning for the group roadmap.
roadmapCanvasView2.phaseReviewTitle: AI review for the current phase
roadmapCanvasView2.groupPreLearningEmptyHint: Create an overall pre-learning quiz for the group roadmap aligned with the shared learning goal.

groupPendingReviewPanel.descriptionLeader: AI-checked group materials land here before they become visible in the shared source list.
groupPendingReviewPanel.descriptionMember: Track the files you just submitted while AI finishes checking them for the group.
groupPendingReviewPanel.emptyLeader: No material is waiting for leader review.
groupPendingReviewPanel.emptyMember: No recent upload is being tracked in this session.

groupSourcesPanel.sourceProcessingTooltip: The source is being processed, please wait.
groupSourcesPanel.sourceIrrelevantTooltip: This source is not relevant to learning

challengeScheduleFields.helper: Only choose future times. The window from start to end must be at least {{minutes}} minutes; bracket matches need a longer window depending on the number of rounds.

errors.endBeforeStart: End time must be after start time.
errors.shortWindow: The window from start to end must be at least {{minutes}} minutes.
errors.pastDate: Do not choose a date or time in the past.
